case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. CRISTINA ROVERSO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $669.02 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT ROVERSO, CRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-13-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
